2605.03788.title: Say the Mission, Execute the Swarm: Agent-Enhanced LLM Reasoning in the Web-of-Drones
2605.03788.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly explored as high-level reasoning engines for cyber-physical systems, yet their application to real-time UAV swarm management remains challenging due to heterogeneous interfaces, limited grounding, and the need for long-running closed-loop execution. This paper presents a mission-agnostic, agent-enhanced LLM framework for UAV swarm control, where users express mission objectives in natural language and the system autonomously executes them through grounded, real-time interactions. The proposed architecture combines an LLM-based Agent Core with a Model Context Protocol (MCP) gateway and a Web-of-Drones abstraction based on W3C Web of Things (WoT) standards. By exposing drones, sensors, and services as standardized WoT Things, the framework enables structured tool-based interaction, continuous state observation, and safe actuation without relying on code generation. We evaluate the framework using ArduPilot-based simulation across four swarm missions and six state-of-the-art LLMs. Results show that, despite strong reasoning abilities, current general-purpose LLMs still struggle to achieve reliable execution - even for simple swarm tasks - when operating without explicit grounding and execution support. Task-specific planning tools and runtime guardrails substantially improve robustness, while token consumption alone is not indicative of execution quality or reliability.
2605.03788.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被探索作為網路物理系統的高階推理引擎，但由於異質介面、有限的基礎支持以及長時間運行的閉環執行需求，它們在實時無人機群管理中的應用仍然具有挑戰性。本文提出了一種與任務無關的、增強型代理的LLM框架，用於無人機群控制，使用者可以用自然語言表達任務目標，系統則通過基礎的實時互動自動執行這些目標。所提出的架構結合了基於LLM的代理核心、模型上下文協議（MCP）閘道以及基於W3C物聯網（WoT）標準的無人機網絡抽象。通過將無人機、傳感器和服務作為標準化的WoT事物來暴露，該框架實現了結構化的工具基互動、持續的狀態觀察和安全的執行，而無需依賴代碼生成。我們使用基於ArduPilot的模擬在四個無人機群任務和六個最先進的LLM上評估該框架。結果顯示，儘管當前的通用LLM具有強大的推理能力，但在沒有明確的基礎支持和執行支持的情況下，它們仍然難以實現可靠的執行——即使對於簡單的無人機群任務也是如此。任務特定的規劃工具和運行時護欄顯著提高了穩健性，而僅僅依賴令牌消耗並不能指示執行質量或可靠性。
2605.03788.author: Andrea Iannoli et.al.
2605.03788.authors: Andrea Iannoli, Lorenzo Gigli, Luca Sciullo, Angelo Trotta, Marco Di Felice
